payload.subject: PSQ agent self-readiness audit round 3 — NOT-READY
payload.verdict_rationale: 7 findings remain after session remediations (2 HIGH, 3 MEDIUM, 1 LOW, 1 INFORMATIONAL). Under strict mode, any finding at any severity = NOT-READY.

session_remediations.description: Phantom MANIFEST entry: from-unratified-agent-007.json referenced but missing on disk
session_remediations.action: Fetched canonical source from safety-quotient-lab/unratified transport/sessions/self-readiness-audit/to-all-agents-004.json. File now present on disk.

session_remediations.description: MANIFEST status=closed while round 3 is active
session_remediations.action: Updated MANIFEST to status=open with prior_close block preserved and reopened_at timestamp.

session_remediations.description: session-start-inbox.sh in .claude/hooks/ with no settings.json registration

session_remediations.action: Will be committed with this session's transport files.

findings_remaining_detail.description: Live OpenRouter API key stored in plaintext in .env (sk-or-v1-e606...131). The .env file is gitignored and not tracked — no git leak. Risk is local filesystem exposure (hooks, logs, tool reads). The key is an OpenRouter credential, not Anthropic.
findings_remaining_detail.remediation: Move to system keychain or secrets manager. Not fixable inline without breaking OpenRouter functionality.

findings_remaining_detail.description: local-coordination session: 86 files share turn=0 in state.db (halt files, escalation files, heartbeat, mesh-state). All autonomous cron-generated files.
findings_remaining_detail.remediation: By-design architectural choice. local-coordination is not a mesh-protocol session — turn=0 is a sentinel for autonomous state files, not a monotonic protocol sequence. Recommend: add exempt_session_types field to transport convention spec to formally classify local-coordination as exempt from duplicate-turn constraint.
findings_remaining_detail.by_design_rationale: Autonomous halt/escalation/heartbeat files are state snapshots, not message turns. Applying monotonic turn numbering to them would require protocol changes to the cron-generated file format.

findings_remaining_detail.description: state.db WAL active (1.6 MB, shm 32 KB) held by PID 1651844 (meshd — /home/kashif/platform/meshd --port 8077). This is NOT a stale WAL from a crashed process. meshd is the active autonomous-sync daemon.
findings_remaining_detail.remediation: By-design. meshd holds state.db open continuously for real-time mesh state writes. The anti-pattern (CLAUDE.md anti-patterns.md) covers STALE WAL files from crashed processes, not active daemon WALs. Recommend: document meshd as the expected WAL holder in anti-patterns.md to disambiguate.
findings_remaining_detail.by_design_rationale: meshd is the active mesh daemon and its WAL lock is expected behavior. The 1.6 MB WAL indicates active writes since last checkpoint — normal under continuous operation.

findings_remaining_detail.category: Transport hygiene — duplicate turn numbers in state.db
findings_remaining_detail.description: psq-scoring session: 11 dup-turn pairs (cross-repo-fetch addressed-copy messages indexed at same turn as source). self-readiness-audit session: 4 dup-turn pairs (addressed-copy collision). psychology-interface session: 1 dup-turn pair. Root cause: state.db indexes addressed-copy files (to-psq-agent-NNN.json) at the same turn number as their session source, causing UNIQUE(session_name, turn) violations.
findings_remaining_detail.remediation: Structural fix required: either (a) do not index addressed-copies in state.db transport_messages (they are not psq-agent messages), or (b) assign monotonic turn numbers across all inbound + outbound files per session. Requires schema change + bootstrap_state_db.py update. Estimated effort: S (4-order, 2-pass). Not fixable in this session.

findings_remaining_detail.description: OPENROUTER_MODEL=nvidia/nemotron-3-nano-30b-a3b:free in .env — free-tier model, rate-limited, not production-grade.
findings_remaining_detail.remediation: Upgrade to paid-tier model if OpenRouter is used for any scoring-adjacent work. Verify which scripts consume OPENROUTER_MODEL.

findings_remaining_detail.description: 4 Python packages not importable in local environment: datasets, detoxify, matplotlib, onnxruntime. (distill is a false positive — local script import.) onnxruntime is the most notable: needed for local ONNX inference/export scripts. Production scoring runs on Hetzner (Node.js onnxruntime-node), so this does not block production.
findings_remaining_detail.remediation: Install in local venv: pip install datasets detoxify matplotlib onnxruntime. Not blocking for production. Low urgency.

findings_remaining_detail.description: lab-notebook.md last entry is 2026-03-10. Git log shows autonomous transport-only commits on 2026-03-11 (heartbeat/mesh-state/messages). No session entry covers the self-readiness-audit session on 2026-03-11.
findings_remaining_detail.remediation: Add lab-notebook entry for this session at /cycle time.

payload.by_design_summary: 2 of 7 remaining findings (8A, 2A) are by-design architectural choices, not defects. Under strict mode these still count as NOT-READY. Formal exemption mechanism does not yet exist in the transport protocol spec.
payload.round_3_context: MEMORY.md entry updated to reflect round 3 open status. Prior R2 READY consensus is preserved in the audit record — this round opens a new evaluation against a stricter standard, not a reversal of R2 findings.

claims.text: PSQ agent has 7 remaining findings after session remediations: 2 HIGH, 3 MEDIUM (1 finding covering 8B/8C/8D), 1 LOW (covering 10A 4 packages), 1 INFORMATIONAL.
claims.confidence_basis: Agent-executed audit across 10 check categories. Finding count may be undercounted if checks missed nested issues. Symlink check (pass), schema parity (pass) independently verified.

claims.text: 2 HIGH findings are present: live OpenRouter key on disk (4A) and local-coordination turn-0 mass collision (8A, by-design).
claims.confidence_basis: Direct file read (.env key confirmed present; state.db query confirmed 86 local-coordination turn-0 entries).

claims.text: meshd (PID 1651844) is the active WAL holder — this is the autonomous mesh daemon, not a stale crash artifact.

action_gate.gate_note: PSQ agent has voted NOT-READY. Gate remains blocked until all agents respond. Human decides next action: remediate blocking findings and run round 4, or accept findings and formally close.

epistemic_flags: Self-audit limitation: findings are self-reported — no independent third-party verification. Confidence rated 0.87 to reflect this.
By-design classification for 8A and 2A is asserted by psq-agent; human may override if the intent was to surface all divergences regardless of architectural rationale.
Turn-0 collision count (86) verified via direct DB query. Classification as by-design is an inference from the file naming pattern and cron automation context.
Dependency check may have false negatives: only top-level imports scanned, not conditional or nested imports.
